description_long: This is a classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and a long, slender metal barrel. The stock is a rich brown color, extending from the butt to the fore-end, and features a smooth, slightly glossy finish. The barrel and receiver are metallic, likely steel, with a dark blued or blackened appearance, and the rifle is equipped with traditional iron sights. The bolt handle is visible on the right side, and the trigger guard and magazine area are integrated into the lower receiver. The rifle's design is reminiscent of early to mid-20th century military rifles, with a fixed stock and an internal magazine. The overall construction appears robust and utilitarian, suitable for both military and civilian use in urban or rural environments.
description: A classic bolt-action rifle with a wooden stock and long metal barrel, featuring iron sights and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden stock, metal barrel, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the muzzle, front sight, and the narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the full wooden stock.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the buttstock and the alignment of the barrel and sights.
